Run full Phase 9 validation and harden any missed coverage
completed_tasks.progress: Focused Phase 9 suites, npm run typecheck, and npm run check passed; no additional coverage hardening was needed.

completed_tasks.name: Update planning traceability after green validation
completed_tasks.progress: ROADMAP.md and REQUIREMENTS.md have Phase 9 completion edits. STATE.md has Phase 09 completion decisions and 100% progress text, but frontmatter/current position still need consistency review before committing final traceability.

remaining_tasks.name: Finish planning traceability and commit Plan 09-04 metadata
Run phase-level verification or final transition/completion flow

blockers.description: No technical blocker. There are unrelated pre-existing uncommitted files that should not be swept into Phase 09 commits unless intentionally handled.
blockers.workaround: Stage only intended Phase 09 planning files and leave .gitignore, CLAUDE.md, and .planning/config.json alone unless separately deciding to commit or revert them.

decisions.decision: Plan 09-04 docs test lives in tests/architecture/reinstall-docs.test.ts and asserts the README reinstall command contract under npm test.
decisions.rationale: Keeps user-facing reinstall syntax and no-network/installed-only/data-cleanup semantics from drifting.

decisions.decision: README documents reinstall as cached-manifest and recorded-version preserving, not as a network refresh path.
decisions.rationale: Avoids confusing reinstall with update/marketplace update and preserves PRL-07 semantics.

decisions.decision: Traceability marks PRL-01/03/04/05/13/14/15/16 complete only after npm run check passed.
decisions.rationale: Plan 09-04 requires green full validation before closing Phase 9 requirements.

next_action: Resume by reviewing .planning/STATE.md for consistency, fixing completed_phases/completed_plans/current position if needed, then commit Phase 09 traceability and create .planning/phases/09-reinstall-edge-bulk-ux/09-04-SUMMARY.md.
context_notes: Phase 09 implementation and validation are effectively complete. Commits eb15d03, 2f0a833, eb2f12a, 00409b0, and 5ab310f cover Plans 09-01 through 09-04 docs/test work. The active work is cleanup/traceability: ROADMAP and REQUIREMENTS completion edits are present but uncommitted; STATE was being reconciled and should be checked carefully before final metadata commit. Full npm run check passed after README docs and reinstall-docs test landed.
